goal: Combine Planet Wars fast-forward style scoring, Halite II outer-lane FFA heuristics, and the existing sample48 domain-factory branch without replacing the stable sample opening.
main_idea: Keep sample48 mode selector and opening. After exact flow scoring, apply a 4P meta scoring layer before greedy assignment: avoid early center brawls, prefer outer production lanes, discount targets already covered by friendly fleets, penalize overkill, and reduce highly contestable neutral grabs.
new_in_sample49: _own_incoming_ship_credit() approximates already-heading friendly fleets from fleet direction
soft center penalty for early 4P neutral/enemy attacks
soft outer-radius and production bonus for neutral lane expansion
overkill and already-covered target penalties using capture_floor at candidate ETA
enemy pressure penalty for poison neutral captures
submission_note: Research candidate. py_compile and synthetic smoke test pass; local Kaggle evaluation was not run in this environment because kaggle_environments is unavailable.
